rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in valid component type scopes with visible feature references
Use only visible AADL identifiers and types in AGREE expressions
generic_rules: Ensure type consistency in AGREE expressions and declarations
Generate AGREE clauses that reference only available model features
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be inside annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Use eq, const, assume, and guarantee syntax with proper type annotations
anti_patterns: Avoid referencing package-qualified identifiers not present in the model
Do not include AADL property names as AGREE variables
